# daytona_admin_send_webhook (Action)

Sends a Daytona webhook event to an organization through the Daytona admin API. This action requires Daytona admin privileges.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `event_type` (String) Daytona webhook event type to send.
- `payload_json` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Webhook payload as a JSON object.

### Optional

- `event_id` (String) Optional webhook event ID for idempotency.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to operate on. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
